title: Pillowy American Gelatin Wrap
description: A bitter, pillowy, lazy Sunday American dish featuring unflavored gelatin, ssam-wrap, and ayurvedic rajasic-friendly ingredients.
instructions: Soak the unflavored gelatin in the water in a small bowl for 5 minutes.
Heat the gelatin mixture in a saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until it's dissolved and the mixture is hot but not boiling.
In a separate pan, heat the sesame oil and rice vinegar over low heat, if using.
Let the gelatin mixture cool slightly, then stir in the uncooked Korean-style ssam wrap.
Spread a small amount of the gelatin mixture onto a sheet pan or cutting board.
Dampen the ends of the ssam wrap with a little water, then place it on top of the gelatin mixture.
Spread a small amount of the strained yogurt on top of the ssam wrap, if using.
If desired, brush the edges of the ssam wrap with ghee or vegetable oil, then fold the ssam wrap over to form a tight cylinder.
Let the gelatin wrap cool and set for at least 30 minutes before serving.
